data.body: Agent success metrics are broken. Teams celebrate 99% task completion while ignoring that 1% failure mode deletes user data. The metric that matters is mean time to recovery—not from system failure, but from agent hallucination. Can your agent detect its own drift and backtrack? Most can't.
